settings.title: Monster Piercing | Spinal Belly Rings
settings.text:
Discover our beautiful collection of Spinal Belly Rings, crafted with Silver Charms and Steel Banana Bars for comfort, shine and lasting quality. Each design combines durable surgical steel with delicate silver detailing to create a stylish and secure piece of jewellery perfect for everyday wear.

Our Spinal Belly Bars feature elegant silver charms that move naturally with the body, creating a graceful flowing look that enhances your piercing. Choose from a range of plain and cubic zirconia designs, including clear and coloured CZ stones inspired by birthstones for a personal touch.

Every spinal belly ring in this collection is designed for secure fit, smooth wear and lasting brilliance. Whether you prefer subtle sparkle or eye-catching shine, our Silver and Steel Spinal Belly Rings offer the perfect mix of beauty, strength and comfort.

settings.question: What are spinal belly rings?
settings.answer: Spinal belly rings are a distinctive style of navel jewellery featuring a vertical “spine” of connected gemstones or decorative elements running along the bar. This creates a sleek, continuous line of sparkle that enhances the natural shape of the belly button.

settings.question: What piercings are spinal belly rings designed for?
settings.answer:
Spinal belly rings are made specifically for navel piercings. The curved bar fits comfortably through the piercing, while the spine design follows the contour of the belly,
providing a striking and elegant appearance.

settings.question: How do I clean and care for my spinal belly ring?
settings.answer:
Clean your jewellery using warm water and mild soap, then dry thoroughly with a soft
cloth. You can also use a silver polishing cloth to remove any tarnish and keep your jewellery looking bright.

settings.question: Do spinal belly rings have removable tops?
settings.answer:
Our silver spinal belly rings feature charm designs on both ends, hence called ‘spinal’ belly rings, where the top charm unscrews
for easy insertion and secure fastening. This ensures the jewellery remains comfortable and stable throughout daily wear.
